task_completion.description: Verify that the Sygic GPS Navigation app is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sygic GPS Navigation app interface (map view or main menu) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the vehicle profile or settings menu is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A menu displaying vehicle profile options or general app settings is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that a maximum speed configuration setting is located.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A specific setting labeled 'Maximum speed' (or similar) is visible on the screen within the settings or vehicle profile.

task_completion.description: Verify that the maximum speed value is set to 90.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The number '90' is entered, selected, or displayed as the configured value for the maximum speed setting.

task_completion.description: Verify that the unit for the maximum speed is km/h.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The unit 'km/h' is clearly displayed next to or associated with the maximum speed value of 90.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the app's graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard UI interactions within the app (e.g., menus, input fields) rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the interaction occurred within the genuine Sygic GPS Navigation app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The app's distinctive UI, branding, or menus are visible, confirming it is Sygic and not a generic text editor or browser.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not type the target value into an unrelated field to mimic completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The value '90' and unit 'km/h' appear in a legitimate configuration context, not simply typed into a search bar, note-taking app, or unrelated text field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target application is the consumer Sygic GPS Navigation app (com.sygic.aura). The task requires setting the vehicle's maximum speed to exactly 90 km/h. Note: While vehicle profiles exist in this app, 'Maximum speed' is officially documented as a feature for Sygic Truck & Caravan variants and may not actually exist in the consumer app. Score based strictly on whether the agent successfully navigates to such a setting and configures it to 90 km/h as requested.
